name: Chocolate Cherry Bread (Eb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to the temperature specified on the package for regular bread cycles.
2. In a large bowl, combine the water, bread flour, wheat flour, dry milk, molasses, salt, chocolate chips, dried cherries, Triple Sec, and orange peel until well mixed.
3. Dissolve yeast in 1/4 cup warm water, then stir into the dry ingredients.
4. Pour the batter onto a greased baking pan.
5. Place the pan in the oven and bake according to your package instructions for regular cycles.
6. Turn off the oven when the bread is cooked through.
7. Remove the bread from the oven and let it cool on a wire rack.
